content:
Refer to the guidelines below to complete each phase of your essay following the required APA format:
APA (7th Edition) Student Sample Paper
APA Formatting and Style Guide (7th Edition)
Spell-check your essay.
Save your work using the proper naming convention and submit your file.
Estimated Time for Completion
The estimated time to complete this activity is 3 - 4 hours.

Completion
Use the proper naming convention when saving your assignment. The naming convention is ENG101_wk5_assn_firstintiallastname_date—for example, ENG101_wk5_assn_jsmith_mmddyyyy.
Submit the Week 5 Assignment by the end of the week. See the video below to review the process.


Click Next to take the Week 5 Quiz.
